logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-1016] The critical path in module 'yolo_conv_top_Pipeline_VITIS_LOOP_83_4_VITIS_LOOP_87_5_VITIS_LOOP_90_6' consists of the following: 'xor' operation ('xor_ln896_62') [4764] (0.978 ns) 'and' operation ('carry') [4765] (0.978 ns) 'select' operation ('deleted_ones') [4775] (0 ns) 'xor' operation ('xor_ln896_63') [4781] (0 ns) 'or' operation ('or_ln896_31') [4782] (0.993 ns) 'xor' operation ('xor_ln896_95') [4783] (0 ns) 'and' operation ('underflow') [4784] (0 ns) 'or' operation ('or_ln346_31') [4786] (0.978 ns) 'select' operation ('output_rec.V') [4787] (0.805 ns) 'call' operation ('_ln178', src/yolo_conv.cpp:178) to 'write_output' [4791] (2.74 ns)
Resolution: For help on HLS 200-1016 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-1016.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-871] Estimated clock period (7.4695ns) exceeds the target (target clock period: 7.5ns, clock uncertainty: 2.025ns, effective delay budget: 5.475ns). Resolution: For help on HLS 200-871 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-871.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-880] The II Violation in module 'yolo_conv_top_Pipeline_VITIS_LOOP_83_4_VITIS_LOOP_87_5_VITIS_LOOP_90_6' (loop 'VITIS_LOOP_83_4_VITIS_LOOP_87_5_VITIS_LOOP_90_6'): Unable to enforce a carried dependence constraint (II = 10, distance = 1, offset = 1) between 'call' operation ('_ln199', src/yolo_conv.cpp:199) to 'out_stream_merge' and fifo request operation ('tmp_7', src/yolo_conv.cpp:176) on port 'out_stream_group_0' (src/yolo_conv.cpp:176). WARNING: [HLS 200-885] The II Violation in module 'slide_window' (function 'slide_window'): Unable to schedule 'load' operation ('kernel_window.val.V', /home/tony/tools/xilinx/Vitis_HLS/2022.2/include/vision/L1/include/common/xf_video_mem.hpp:297) on array 'line_buff_0' due to limited memory ports (II = 3). Please consider using a memory core with more ports or partitioning the array 'line_buff_0'. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-885 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-885.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-885] The II Violation in module 'slide_window' (function 'slide_window'): Unable to schedule 'load' operation ('kernel_window.val.V', /home/tony/tools/xilinx/Vitis_HLS/2022.2/include/vision/L1/include/common/xf_video_mem.hpp:297) on array 'line_buff_0' due to limited memory ports (II = 2). Please consider using a memory core with more ports or partitioning the array 'line_buff_0'.
